commands.review_summary:
The PR quarantines invalid runtime tool schemas before provider normalization in embedded agent attempts and compaction, keeps provider-repairable schemas flowing, logs diagnostics, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +346, Tests +412. Total +758 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main normalizes raw attempt and compaction tools before safe runtime projection, and the PR tests show unreadable rows, unreadable parameters, and circular schemas are the trigger shapes. I did not execute the repro locally because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR has no narrow automated repair target; the remaining action is maintainer judgment on compatibility semantics and split hardening sequence.

target.title: fix(agents): quarantine invalid runtime tool schemas
target.body:
## Summary

- Keeps this PR scoped to runtime tool-schema quarantine across assistant attempts and compaction, where provider/model tool projection can otherwise fail before useful content or diagnostics.
- Safely reads runtime tool arrays, tool rows, tool names, and tool parameter schemas before provider normalization or model-session setup.
- Quarantines unsupported or unreadable active tool schemas, emits diagnostics for dropped unreadable rows, and preserves healthy sibling tools so assistant attempts and compaction can continue.

## Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.test-support.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.harness.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.test-support.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.harness.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts --reporter=verbose` passed 2 routed Vitest shards / 126 tests on head `d392db89063`.
- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts --reporter=verbose` passed 2 routed Vitest shards / 67 tests after the harness type fix on head `d5f3dda0540`.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` reported no accepted/actionable findings.
- Touched-file scrub for reported fixture names, private paths, and install-error output returned no matches.
- Direct local `tsgo` prod/test type probes were blocked by sparse-checkout guards for missing `ui/config` inputs; GitHub Actions full-checkout `check-prod-types` and `check-test-types` passed on head `d5f3dda0540`.
- GitHub PR checks on head `d5f3dda0540`: pending=0, failed=0 at the latest poll.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: a bad active runtime tool schema, unreadable tool descriptor, unreadable tool row, unreadable bundled-tool row, or circular/non-serializable compaction tool schema should not crash assistant setup or compaction before content/diagnostics.

Real environment tested: fresh sparse `gwt` worktree on current `origin/main` using the repo Vitest router; GitHub Actions full-checkout CI passed on the PR head.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts --reporter=verbose`.

Evidence after fix: focused tests cover unsupported schemas, provider-repairable schemas, unreadable descriptors, unreadable tool rows, explicit allowlists, bundled MCP allowlists, quarantine logging without re-reading hostile rows, and compaction quarantine before provider normalization.

Observed result after fix: healthy tools remain available while malformed or unreadable active tools are filtered before provider normalization/model-session setup, both for normal assistant attempts and compaction.

What was not tested: no separate local Testbox/Crabbox run beyond GitHub PR checks. Doctor validation is handled by follow-up PR #88493.
